title: Notifies Forensic Science Laboratory, Sector 14, Rohini, New Delhi under Government of National Capital Territory of Delhi, as Examiner of Electronic Evidence within India
description: Notifies Forensic Science Laboratory, Sector 14, Rohini, New Delhi under Government of National Capital Territory of Delhi, as Examiner of Electronic Evidence within India

[No. 1(13)/2015-CLFE ] S. GOPALAKRISHNAN, Jt.
